# Adbnik v1.3.0

## Highlights

- **Terminal:** Better line breaks for SSH/ADB PTY output (no more glued `ls` + output). SSH menu commands send on a clean line.
- **Explorer:** SFTP/FTP **Pull** for a single file uses your open session again; after pull, the file can open in the default app like a normal download.
- **UI:** Colored terminal tab labels, bookmark open/not-open indicators, ADB menu icons aligned with the in-app Android icon, shorter on-screen hints, and clearer application log lines.

**Full changelog:** [CHANGELOG.md — 1.3.0](https://github.com/nvnkennedy/adbnik/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
